leadText: Castaway Shore (Japanese: 迷子の磯辺 Strays' Shore) is an area located in the central region of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is located north of Tranquility Cove, northwest of Ginkgo Landing, and south of Veilstone Cape.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Castaway Shore is a rugged shoreline, and the northernmost part of Tranquility Cove. Rocky outcrops stick out from the water and as part of the shore.
